final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster / PPT cover slide for the launch of 长安起源Q06, an automotive brand reveal, scheduled for September release.

Style/medium: photorealistic automotive marketing visual, sleek and dramatic, in the spirit of high-end Chinese auto brand launch campaigns
Composition: wide horizontal layout suited for a 16:9 presentation cover, car as hero element centered or slightly right-weighted, title and subtitle text overlaid on the left third
Subject: 长安起源Q06 SUV silhouette rendered with sharp body lines and premium surface reflections, conveying power and modernity
Scene/backdrop: deep cosmic or atmospheric backdrop — dark gradient sky with volumetric light rays breaking through, translucent glass-like depth layers creating a sense of visual breakthrough and grandeur
Lighting/mood: dramatic rim lighting on the vehicle, cool blue-white ambient glow with warm accent highlights, awe-inspiring and forward-looking
Color palette: deep midnight navy or near-black as base, electric ice-blue as primary accent, warm champagne gold as secondary accent for brand prestige
Materials/textures: mirror-polished car body with visible reflections, translucent layered light planes suggesting depth and transparency
Text (verbatim): "长安起源Q06" as main title, "9月上市" as subtitle
Constraints: text zones must have sufficient contrast against background; layout must work as a 16:9 widescreen slide cover; brand name must be legible at presentation scale
Avoid: generic stock-photo car backgrounds, lens flare overload, cluttered composition, watermark, flat lighting, cartoonish rendering
